name: Kim Chee#4
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak cabbages overnight in salt water to wilt.
2. The next day, wash cabbage 3 times until there is no more "slimy" feel.
3. Cut the green part of scallion into 1/2-inch long slivers and mince the white part.
4. Add scallion, garlic, and ginger to cabbage.
5. Mix together red pepper, MSG, salt, and water in a one cup measuring cup to make 1/2 cup juice.
6. Pack cabbage mixture loosely into jars.
7. Pour juice into jars to cover.
8. Poke with chopstick to release air.
9. Seal and let set overnight in refrigerator.
10. Keep refrigerated.
